message:
✨ Add unified card controls and cache-while-refreshing to AI Health Check card (#1019)

Wire the Health Check card into the standard card framework used by 65+ other cards:
- Cache-while-refreshing: properly wire useCardLoadingState with isFailed/consecutiveFailures
  from useCachedPodIssues and useCachedDeploymentIssues so stale data is shown during refresh
- Unified controls on Issues view: search, sort (status/name/restarts/cluster/kind),
  sort direction, pagination, and per-card cluster filter via CardControlsRow
- Breakdown view respects local cluster filter for consistent filtering
- Uses useCardData hook for filtering, sorting, and pagination

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
